first_party_audiences.name: Past Purchasers — 180 Days
first_party_audiences.description: All website visitors who completed a purchase event in the last 180 days. Segment synced via Meta Pixel and Google Ads tag.
first_party_audiences.notes: Primary seed audience for lookalike expansion. Also used as suppression for new customer campaigns.

first_party_audiences.name: Cart Abandoners — 14 Days
first_party_audiences.description: Users who added to cart but did not purchase within the last 14 days. High-intent retargeting segment.
first_party_audiences.notes: Highest ROAS retargeting segment. Suppress users who purchased after cart abandonment.

first_party_audiences.name: Site Visitors — 30 Days
first_party_audiences.description: All website visitors (any page) in the last 30 days. Broad retargeting pool.

first_party_audiences.name: CRM — All Customers
first_party_audiences.description: Full customer email list from Salesforce. Used for suppression and customer match targeting.
first_party_audiences.notes: Exported monthly by data team. Requires hashing before upload (email, phone). LiveRamp handles identity resolution for DV360.

first_party_audiences.name: CRM — VIP Customers (LTV Top 20%)
first_party_audiences.description: Customers in the top 20% by lifetime value. Used as high-quality lookalike seed and for exclusivity offers.

first_party_audiences.name: B2B Leads — HubSpot
first_party_audiences.description: All B2B leads captured via LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms and website forms, synced to HubSpot.
first_party_audiences.notes: Used for nurture campaigns on LinkedIn and Meta. Segment by lead status: MQL vs SQL.

first_party_audiences.name: Suppression — Recent Purchasers (30 Days)
first_party_audiences.description: Purchasers in the last 30 days. Applied as exclusion to all prospecting campaigns to avoid wasting spend on recent buyers.
first_party_audiences.notes: Must be applied to all prospecting and awareness campaigns. Exception: re-purchase campaigns or cross-sell campaigns.

first_party_audiences.name: Mobile App Users
first_party_audiences.description: Users who have installed and opened the Acme mobile app. Synced via Meta SDK and Google Firebase.

data_providers.name: Oracle Data Cloud (Moat / Grapeshot)
data_providers.notes: Primary third-party data provider for DV360 programmatic. Oracle audiences applied as targeting overlays on brand campaigns. Audience usage triggers incremental CPM.

data_providers.name: Experian Marketing Data
data_providers.notes: Demographic and life-event segments. Used on Meta for income and homeowner targeting overlays. Upcoming contract renewal — evaluate against LiveRamp Marketplace alternatives.

data_providers.name: Bombora B2B Intent Data
data_providers.notes: B2B intent signals for LinkedIn campaigns. Applied to LinkedIn B2B lead gen campaign. Renewal decision needed by May 2026.

onboarding_platforms.name: LiveRamp Data Collaboration
use_cases: CRM list onboarding for customer match targeting
onboarding_platforms.notes: Primary data onboarding vendor. All CRM uploads go through LiveRamp for PII hashing and identity matching before platform upload. TAT: 48-72 hours for new audience activation.

onboarding_platforms.name: Habu Clean Room
onboarding_platforms.notes: Used for privacy-safe analysis that requires joining first-party data with platform data. Not used for real-time activation. Analysis requests take 3-5 business days.

lookalike_strategy.notes: Default expansion is 1% for efficiency-focused campaigns. Scale to 5% when volume is constrained. Always suppress seed audience from lookalike targeting. Test new seed audiences before scaling spend against them.

entries.notes: 1% delivers lowest CPA. 5% used when scaling spend above $3k/day and 1% audience saturates (frequency >3).
Higher quality seed. Used for premium product line campaigns.
Google's 'similar segments' equivalent. Less precise than Meta LAL — use as secondary signal alongside keyword targeting.

third_party_layers.name: In-Market: Home & Garden
third_party_layers.performance_notes: Applied by default to all brand DV360 campaigns. Reduces wasted impressions by ~30% vs run-of-network. Best-performing audience overlay for our category.

third_party_layers.name: Homeowner (Experian)
third_party_layers.performance_notes: Strong performer for home goods campaigns. Adds $1.20 CPM but typically improves CPA by 15-20% by eliminating renters who are outside our ICP.

third_party_layers.name: HH Income $75k+ (Experian)
third_party_layers.performance_notes: Mixed results. Stronger for premium product line (AOV >$200), minimal impact for core product range. Test before scaling.

third_party_layers.name: Online Shoppers — Heavy (Oracle)
third_party_layers.performance_notes: Default overlay on all DV360 prospecting campaigns. Consistently improves CTR vs untargeted inventory.

third_party_layers.name: B2B Intent: Marketing Technology (Bombora)
third_party_layers.performance_notes: Default for LinkedIn B2B campaigns. High CPM premium but significantly reduces cost-per-MQL by pre-qualifying intent. Best paired with job title targeting.

third_party_layers.name: New Mover — 12 Months (Experian)
third_party_layers.performance_notes: Seasonal performance — strong Q1 and Q4 (moving season). Tested Q2 2025 with inconclusive results. Re-test Q4 2026.
